description: Deed of engagement. Location: Qalyūb: Dated: last decade of Tishrei 4991 AM = September/October 1230 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides. The groom's name is Yefet and the bride is represented by an agent named Nadiv ha-Kohen. On verso there are later jottings or accounts, partially in Arabic script.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
